_comment: Gzipped first-paint budgets enforced by scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs (npm scripts: bundlesize / bundlesize:update). See BUNDLE_BUDGET.md. Ceilings are locked via `bundlesize:update`; raising one is a deliberate, reviewable ratchet. maxGzipBytes is set by --update — do not hand-edit.

budgets.name: showcase-initial
budgets.description: Eager first-paint payload of the public /showcase/three-streams portal: every <script type=module> + <link rel=stylesheet> in the built showcase.html, gzipped. Prong B (ADR 2026-05-21-atlas-showcase-bundle-split) keeps the authed heavy graph — maplibre-gl, @turf/turf, the FAO EcoCrop dataset, and the SiteIntelligencePanel compute/section chunks — DYNAMIC, so none of them may appear here. A re-leak adds at least 53 kB gz and trips this ceiling.
